# Discord. # ​ Discord (Bot API). ## Channel troubleshooting. Create a Discord application and bot. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --dry-run. openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN. openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --strict-json. openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE>`. ## ​ Recommended: Set up a guild workspace. ## ​ Runtime model. `agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>`. `channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false`. `agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>`. ## ​ Forum channels. `openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. `openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \. ## ​ Interactive components. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. `channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom`. ## ​ Native commands and command auth. `channels.discord.dms["<user_id>"].historyLimit`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.ackReaction`. | reactions, messages, threads, pins, polls, search, memberInfo, roleInfo, channelInfo, channels, voiceStatus, events, stickers, emojiUploads, stickerUploads, permissions | enabled |. `channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor`. `channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor`. ## ​ Voice channels. `channels.discord.voice.enabled=false`. ## ​ Voice messages. `message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.eventQueue.listenerTimeout`. `channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs`. `channels.discord.dm.enabled=false`. `channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true`. `channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24`. `discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected`. ## ​ Configuration reference pointers. ## ​ Related.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: Scheduling, Timing & Payload Options
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron jobs in OpenClaw let you schedule tasks that execute at specific times or intervals without manual intervention. Unlike heartbeats which follow a fixed checklist, cron jobs are individual scheduled tasks with their own timing, payload, and execution context. This lesson covers how to create cron jobs and the different timing and payload options available. * **openclaw cron add**: The CLI command to create a new scheduled job. These two jobs have different schedules and payloads, but both are managed through the same cron system with simple CLI commands. Creating a cron job uses the `openclaw cron add` command with one of three timing options. For schedules that do not fit a simple interval, use standard cron expression syntax:. If you forget to use --every or --cron for recurring tasks, the job will execute once and never run again. * `openclaw cron add` creates scheduled jobs with three timing options: --at (one-time), --every (interval), --cron (expression).

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. openclaw cron add \ --name "Call back reminder" \ --at "20m" \ --session main \ --system-event "Reminder: call the client back." \ --wake now \ --delete-after-run. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. openclaw cron add \ --name "Deep analysis" \ --cron "0 6 * * 1" \ --tz "Europe/Bucharest" \ --session isolated \ --message "Weekly deep analysis of project progress and risks." \ --model "opus" \ --thinking high \ --announce \ --channel telegram \ --to "123456789". * `openclaw cron list` to see all jobs. * `openclaw cron run`  to test a job immediately. * `openclaw cron remove`  when a job is no longer useful. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?

title: 🦞 How to Set Up OpenClaw Cron Jobs (With Examples You Can Copy)
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ### One-Shot Reminder. --system-event "Reminder: review the weekly report" \. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Share this post. ## Related posts. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. Discover Wukong intelligent work assistant – an AI-powered productivity tool with 5 key features: advanced.
